description: Measuring AI performance in terms of the length of HCAST: Human-Calibrated Autonomy Software task and RE (Research Engineering) task (measured by how long they take by human professionals) that generalist frontier model agents can complete autonomously with 50% reliability. It has been doubling approximately every 7 months for the last 6 years. Extrapolating this trend predicts that, in under a decade, we will see AI agents that can independently complete a large fraction of software tasks that currently take humans days or weeks.
